title: polyscias guilfoylei
intro: Polyscias guilfoylei, also known as the Guilfoyle's mammy tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. Traditionally used in medicine, Polyscias guilfoylei has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Polyscias guilfoylei often include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, though more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
